Checkout
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What do I get after purchasing?
After payment via PayPal you receive a secure one-time download link by email. The link is valid for 48 hours. You can download your font files (OTF, TTF, WOFF2) and a PDF license certificate.
Can I use the fonts commercially?
Yes. All HypeForType licenses cover commercial use within the scope of the license type purchased (Desktop, Web, App, or Broadcast).
What is a trial font?
Trial fonts are single-weight samples for evaluation purposes only. They are not licensed for commercial use. Purchase a full license to use the font in your projects.
I lost my download link — what do I do?
Email support@hypefortype.com with your PayPal transaction ID and we will issue a new download link within 24 hours.
Can I use the font on multiple computers?
Desktop licenses cover up to 5 CPUs. If you need more, contact us for studio/enterprise pricing.
Do you offer refunds?
Due to the digital nature of font files, we do not offer refunds once a font has been downloaded. If you have a technical issue, contact us and we will resolve it.
What formats are included?
Full licenses include OTF, TTF, and WOFF2 files. Trial fonts are supplied as a single OTF file.
Still have a question? support@hypefortype.com
